page_content:
Credit Only Granted for. BUMK758R or BUMK747.

Formerly: BUMK758R.

BUMK750 Customer Equity Management (2 Credits)

Managing customers of a business, whether in B2B or B2C space,

as a portfolio of equity. Understanding the current and future value

of customers to the business. Topics include selective acquisition, development, and retention of customers using latest developments in information technology.

Restriction: Must be in Business and Management (Master's) program; or permission of BMGT-Robert H. Smith School of Business.

Credit Only Granted for. BUMK722 or BUMK750.
